creator: webadmin@itenas.ac.id
text:
Dear colleague,

I'm from Institut Teknologi Nasional, a higher education in Bandung, Indonesia (https://www.itenas.ac.id). As a representative of my institution, I would like to apply to become a consulting service partner in FreeBSD, and listed in https://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult_bycat/

Please let me know if there are any form that I should fill in

Thank you

kind regards,
Dr. Nyoman Karna
